items.raw_desc: PC játék Star Wars: The Force Unleashed II - PC:Fans of the iconic Starwars saga, beware. The most successful Star Wars action game to date brings its second sequel to build on the previous installment. The game's story takes the player to the period between the Star Wars movies: Episode III of Revenge of the Sith and Star Wars: Episode IV of A New Hope. You will take on the role of Starkiller, a former apprentice of the mysterious Darth Vader, with whom you will embark on a galactic adventure filled with diverse enemies. In order to defend yourself, you will have to discover all of Starkiller's abilities, which are greatly improved in this installment, and the game promises even more "carnage" than in the last installment. You will be able to use e.g. so-called Mind Trick, or the ability to confuse the minds of your enemies, pitting them against their own allies, or the Force Grenade ability, where you grab someone, charge them with lightning, and then send them flying. A Tescoma Delícia 2in1 habverővel és díszítővel akár várakat és szobrokat is készíthetsz a desszerten. A rugalmas és szilikon tömítéssel ellátott habverő lemez sűrű tejszínhabot készít a tejszínből.
